item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 4min The public has voted @Kerry_Official 's Jordan Brick the #GAA Hurler of the Week! #GAABelon
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 4min The public has voted @Kerry_Official 's Jordan Brick the #GAA Hurler of the Week! #GAABelong De gaa.ie 206

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 37min Donegal are going for three-in-a-row in Ulster. They've never achieved that in their
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 37min Donegal are going for three-in-a-row in Ulster. They've never achieved that in their history.
Since the end of WWII, three-in-a-row has only been done three times in Ulster, and just once since the early 1960s.
Cavan 1947-49 Down 1959-61 Armagh 2004-06 1 8 1 mil

item.title: The42_ie: Declan Bogue reposteó The42.ie @The42_ie · 2h NEW POD: Who will survive Munster? And six forwards who can define the Cha
item.description:
Declan Bogue reposteó The42.ie @The42_ie · 2h NEW POD: Who will survive Munster? And six forwards who can define the Championship
@fotoole13 and @DeclanBogue join @RonanEarly to preview the hurling Championship. De the42.ie 2 1 mil
